name: Soy Seared Tuna with Orange Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 yellow squash - cut in half lengthwise and sliced into half moons
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion until browned and caramelized.
2. Combine soy sauce, sugar, and ginger to create a glaze.
3. Boil green beans in water until they ripen in color, then remove.
4. Add curry powder, orange juice, and diced habaneros to the chicken broth.
5. Add sliced squash to the sauteed onions.
6. Cook tuna in olive oil for 5-8 minutes on each side.
7. Pour the soy glaze over the tuna before removing it from the pan.
8. Plate with orange sauce first, then arrange squash and onions on a bed of greens, placing the tuna steak as the final addition.
